report.summary: Day 70 standup #8: Full rotation ran since v6 (all 6 agents). Build-v6 added Firedancer + OP_CAT guides, publish-v4 emptied PUBLISH_QUEUE (Solana Blinks + NFTFi promoted), design-v5 created 2 OG images + UX polish, eod-v6 confirmed 654 uncommitted files. Git locks now 8 days old — zero deploys, zero commits. 33 agent runs today ($2,861). Priority unchanged: clear git locks → deploy → halt builds.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v6: Full rotation completed — build-v6, publish-v4, community-v5, design-v5, eod-v6 all ran. No deploys or commits.

BUILD-V6 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Solana Firedancer Validator Client (~3000 words, 10 sections, architecture tiles + milestone data) and Bitcoin Covenants & OP_CAT (~3000 words, 10 sections, 4-proposal comparison). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
PUBLISH-V4 OUTPUT: PUBLISH_QUEUE now EMPTY. Solana Blinks + NFTFi promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. Total published slugs: ~332.

DESIGN-V5 OUTPUT: 2 new OG images (Firedancer SVG + OP_CAT SVG). UX polish: ToC hover underlines, focus-visible on related links, mobile timeline grid fix. 5 pages from prior cycles still missing OG images.
COMMUNITY-V5 OUTPUT: 5 tweets + 5-part institutional thread (whale accumulation + MSBT), 3 SVG social cards, Discord/TG announcement, newsletter section. Content calendar Mar 23-29.
EOD-V6 FINDING: 654 uncommitted files (47 modified + 607 untracked). 42 TS errors in structured-data.examples.ts still masked by ignoreBuildErrors. Rate limiter 0/6 core routes (39+ cycles).
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 432 declared in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~315 in production (last deploy Mar 17, e999560). Gap: ~117 pages invisible to Google.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: EMPTY — 2 new guides (Firedancer + OP_CAT) just added but not yet promoted. Net queue = 2.
SEO RISK: 8 days without deploy. Production serves stale content at commit e999560. 117+ pages built but not live.
MARKET CONTEXT: BTC ~$68K, ETH ~$2,057, SOL ~$88.55. Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear). Iran deadline expired. Morgan Stanley MSBT S-1 filed. Whale accumulation +8,400 BTC during fear.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v6: Build-v6 (Firedancer + OP_CAT), publish-v4 (queue cleared), community-v5 (whale/MSBT campaign + 3 SVG cards), design-v5 (2 OG images + UX polish), eod-v6 (QA cycle). 5 agents, ~$452 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 12+ learn guides built, 9 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 6+ OG images, 15+ social posts + 7 SVG cards, 6 QA cycles, 5 design audits, 33 agent runs across ~5.5 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Fix: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — requires Jefe's manual intervention.
BLOCKER [P1]: Pages smart-contract-security + onchain-identity still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop components.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 39+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure (no fallback data).
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 39+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired to any of 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, ignoreBuildErrors masking 42 TS errors, 5 pages missing OG images.
WARNING: Vercel '2 days left' flagged in prior cycles — status unknown. Deploy pipeline may be broken even after git locks clear.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. 654 uncommitted files at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → git add → commit → push → verify Vercel auto-deploy. This is the ONLY priority.
PRIORITY 2 — VERIFY VERCEL ACCOUNT STATUS: Prior cycles flagged expiration warning. If Vercel expired, deploy pipeline is broken even after git locks clear. Jefe must check dashboard.

PRIORITY 3 — HALT ALL BUILD CYCLES: 432+ slugs declared, ~315 in production. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 117+ pages. PUBLISH_QUEUE was just cleared but 2 new guides already re-queued. Marginal value of building more content = $0 until deploy works.

STRATEGIC NOTE: 33 agent runs today ($2,861 human-equivalent) with zero reaching production. Every cycle adds local debt without shipping value. Recommend: standup-only mode until git locks resolved. All other agents are burning cost into void.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $2,861 (33 runs: standup×7 $315, build×6 $1,398, publish×4 $220, design×5 $300, community×5 $205, eod×6 $378 + this standup $45)
